suggestedEdits.report: Loss-of-function mutations in the gene encoding progranulin (PGRN) are a common cause of frontotemporal dementia, leading to markedly decreased PGRN levels. A potential therapeutic strategy is therefore to increase extracellular PGRN by blocking sortilin-mediated endocytosis.

suggestedEdits.report: Gastric cancer remains a leading cause of cancer-related mortality, with positive peritoneal lavage cytology (PLC) indicating early peritoneal metastasis and poor prognosis. However, conventional imaging and laparoscopy lack sufficient sensitivity for early detection.
